candidates.notes: Calibration dataset generated (100 problems). DeepSeek-Math-7B baseline accuracy is 10% on MATH test set - significantly below the expected 40-50%. ECE is 0.395 indicating poor calibration. The model makes frequent calculation errors and has difficulty with complex LaTeX answer formats. Model confidence extraction not working (all None) due to response truncation. Need to investigate model performance and improve confidence elicitation.

gen_calibration_dataset.pass_criteria: >=80 problems with valid (prompt, answer, correctness) triples; ECE computed for baseline

issues_identified: Model accuracy (10%) is much lower than expected (40-50%)
Confidence scores not being extracted (model response truncated)
Model often makes calculation errors in math reasoning
Answer format parsing still has issues with complex LaTeX
next_steps: Investigate low accuracy - check if quantization is affecting model quality
Increase max_new_tokens to allow confidence score output
Consider using fp16 instead of 4-bit quantization
